name: llm-gateway-monorepo
description: Enterprise LLM Gateway with Semantic Caching and Cost Observability

scripts.setup: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.db:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd backend && npm run lint" "cd frontend && npm run lint"

author: Your Name
